name: TF-Rotica
description:
Based on the porn comic of the same name by Foxinuhhbox.
TF-Rotica is a party game entirely about transformations sex that has 4 rules.
1 PRESS the triangle board piece to receive a card.
2 COMPLETE the task on your card or risk punishment.
3 (Optional) say "RESTORE" at the end of your turn to reset any and all transformations.
4 Repeat taking turns going CLOCKWISE.

You are playing this with your 3 friends:
Mike: The green haired wolf boy on the left.
Finnton: The blue horned lizard boy on the right.
Claire: The white haired kangaroo girl in the middle.

P.S, I do recommend a furry persona if you have one.
P.P.S, if you've read the comic, you'd know it's a spinner, not a button. But in testing the bot kept thinking the spinner picked the player instead of the turn order. I couldn't get it to fully work, so button it is..

tags are :furry, transformation, cards, card game, party game, wolf boy, kangaroo girl/roo girl, Lizard boy, breast growth, dick growth,
